description: A geographic place. Maps to CIDOC CRM E53 Place (http://www.cidoc-crm.org/cidoc-crm/E53_Place).

Country.description: Country name. Denormalised label; no direct CIDOC property (a faithful model would use P89 falls within a containing E53 Place).

Coordinates.description: Latitude and longitude. CIDOC P168 place is defined by (E94 Space Primitive).

Description.description: Short description. CIDOC P3 has note.
